title: Varying color of LABELs by column?

posts.author: tjb (Troy Brophy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

First, how is there not an existing tag in this Community platform for the regular old “Label” column type, which is in the “Essential” group?

Second, and my actual question: How can I change the color of the labels in a Label column? I don’t mean, how can each label have a different color, I mean, I have three Label columns side-by-side, and their contents are all light blue. It would be great if I could have Column A’s labels be light green, Column B’s be light orange, etc.

It appears there’s no way to do this, even if Google’s AI insists it’s possible.

What are you trying to achieve

Different color labels by column, so that labels in different columns have a different appearance and its easier to tell one column’s purpose from another at a glance.
